entry: When 5-min EMA(5)>EMA(20) and breakout above recent high; signalScore>=0.6
exit: target 4% OR stop -3% OR time-exit 7 days
risk_control: max drawdown per-day 2%, per-trade stop; promote probe to full after 2 consecutive positive probes
hypothesis: Trend setups respond to momentum entries; smaller sizing reduces risk while allowing enough probes to run.

entry: When RSI(14)<30 && price below lower Bollinger band and mean-reversion oscillator confirms; signalScore>=0.65
exit: target 6% OR stop -4% OR time-exit 10 days
risk_control: per-symbol cap 1 probe, promote after single strong probe with positive pnl and technicalEffective=true
hypothesis: Rebound setups have higher per-trade PnL; slightly larger target and stop reflect mean reversion behaviour.

entry: Rule-based selection: if momentum strength>0.7 use variant_a entry, else if meanBias>0.5 use variant_b; enforce cross-checks
exit: target 5% OR stop -3.5% OR time-exit 8 days
sizing: 0.45% portfolio per trade, cap 3 concurrent (max 2 per-focus)
risk_control: diversify across symbols and setupTypes; auto-halt if probe loss rate >50% in last 10 probes
hypothesis: Combining both focuses increases setupDiversity and reduces risk of low-sample bias; selection rule prioritizes strongest signal.
